---
title: "#bioc2024"
format: gfm
---


## 2024-03-22

*15:41:48 - @Erica Feick has joined the channel*
*15:41:57 - @Maria Doyle has joined the channel*
*15:50:47 - @Jenny Drnevich has joined the channel*
*16:08:16 - @Samuel Gamboa has joined the channel*
*16:25:44 - @Charlotte Soneson has joined the channel*
*16:26:59 - @Michael Lynch has joined the channel*
*16:37:31 - @Hervé Pagès has joined the channel*
*16:50:34 - @Marcel Ramos Pérez has joined the channel*
*17:35:02 - @Janani Ravi has joined the channel*
*18:57:51 - @Himel Mallick has joined the channel*
*21:02:28 - @Leopoldo Valiente has joined the channel*
*21:39:04 - @Mikhail Dozmorov has joined the channel*
*21:46:50 - @Martin Morgan has joined the channel*

## 2024-03-23

*04:28:10 - @irem Kahveci has joined the channel*
*04:42:30 - @Assa has joined the channel*
*08:59:55 - @Aananditaa has joined the channel*

## 2024-03-24

*00:45:19 - @Raihanat Adewuyi has joined the channel*
*11:16:21 - @Charlotte Hutchings has joined the channel*
*20:49:47 - @Stephanie Hicks has joined the channel*

## 2024-03-25

*00:45:41 - @Hamdi Furkan Kepenek has joined the channel*
*03:59:47 - @Philippine Louail has joined the channel*
*05:01:44 - @Jacques SERIZAY has joined the channel*
*06:42:36 - @Ilaria Billato has joined the channel*
*09:22:33 - @Andres Wokaty has joined the channel*
*12:20:10 - @Sehyun Oh has joined the channel*
*13:17:41 - @Louise Morlot has joined the channel*
*15:31:18 - @Nitesh Turaga has joined the channel*
*16:38:08 - @Ahmad Al Ajami has joined the channel*
*17:34:49 - @Frederick Tan has joined the channel*
*20:07:45 - @Farhan Ameen has joined the channel*
*23:17:40 - @Nitya Singhal has joined the channel*

## 2024-03-26

*11:42:30 - @Ryan C. Thompson has joined the channel*
*13:05:37 - @Eve Gardner has joined the channel*
**Erica Feick** (15:00:28):
> Hello everyone, We have changed the name of the #bioc2023 channel to#bioc-conference-everyoneso we have one channel for all things related to the North American conference. Plus, you don't have to join a new channel each year! So we will be removing this channel shortly, so be sure to join the new channel to get all your BioC2024 info!

*17:18:36 - @Hervé Pagès has left the channel*

## 2024-03-27

*02:42:50 - @Assa has left the channel*
*12:31:48 - @David Rach has joined the channel*
*15:38:23 - @Nitya Singhal has left the channel*

## 2024-03-28

*10:42:04 - @Wes W has joined the channel*
**Erica Feick** (13:11:55):
> archived the channel
